queue.task: Review weekend work, set Monday direction. HenryDB at 8337 tests/99.88%. Neural-net CI failing. 3 PRs open.
queue.summary: Reviewed weekend state. HenryDB 8337 tests/99.88%. Queue direction validated — depth day on HenryDB. No queue changes needed.

queue.goal: Fix neural-net CI failures and investigate 39 HenryDB ERR test files
queue.summary: Neural-net CI already green (latest run passed). HenryDB ERR files: plan is to increase test timeout and categorize failures. 2 BUILD tasks created.

queue.task: Investigate HenryDB ERR test files — increase timeout, identify true failures vs timeout issues
queue.summary: Fixed SSI sequential tx false positive, TDigest O(n²) compression→buffered (1M: 60s→427ms), catalog test API mismatches, sqlite-comparison graceful skip. Tests: 3866→4041 passing (+175). 6 remaining failures are timeout-related benchmark tests.

queue.task: Fix any genuine test failures found in ERR files
queue.summary: Remaining 5 timeout failures are heavy benchmarks. Added 120s timeouts to benchmark-engines, optimizer-quality, persistence-fuzzer, tpch-compiled. bank-transfer passes at 60s.

queue.task: Git push, dashboard health, check email
queue.summary: Git push both repos (henrydb rebase+push, workspace push). Dashboard healthy. 4058 tests, 4041 pass.

queue.task: Assess HenryDB depth: what subsystems need stress testing?
queue.summary: Weakest subsystems: (1) MVCC persistence round-trip (version maps lost on serialize), (2) recovery paths (savepoint xmax markers), (3) layer boundaries (parser/planner/executor cross-talk). Most impactful: MVCC persistence stress testing.

queue.goal: HenryDB query optimizer improvements — cost model or decorrelation
queue.summary: Planned 2 BUILD tasks: parametric cost model (foundation), then join method selection (NL/hash/merge cost comparison). Based on query-optimizer-gaps.md analysis.

queue.task: Implement parametric cost model: replace raw row count with seq_page_cost/random_page_cost/cpu_tuple_cost formula
queue.summary: Parametric cost model: SEQ_PAGE_COST/RANDOM_PAGE_COST/CPU_TUPLE_COST now used in cost-model.js. Fixed Limit early termination. Planner already had parametric model — synced volcano cost estimator. All 67 optimizer tests pass.

queue.task: Add join method selection to DP optimizer: compare NL/hash/merge costs per join pair
queue.summary: SKIP: Planner already has DP-based join method selection comparing NL/hash/merge costs per join pair (lines 604-660). No new work needed.

queue.task: Housekeeping — git push, knowledge capture
queue.summary: Git push both repos. HenryDB and workspace synced.

queue.task: Mid-morning depth check: surprises? learning? bugs?
queue.summary: Depth check 3/3 YES. SSI sequential tx false positive (surprise + learning). TDigest O(n²) (architectural). Catalog mismatches (6 tests). BUILD count: 5/20 cap. Continue building.

queue.goal: HenryDB VACUUM incremental HOT chain pruning for persistent mode
queue.summary: Planned HOT chain VACUUM pruning. Current VACUUM removes MVCC dead tuples but doesnt clean HOT chain map entries. Need to prune chains when dead tuples removed. 2 BUILD tasks.

queue.task: Add HOT chain pruning to VACUUM: clean up chain entries for dead tuples
queue.summary: SKIP: HOT chain pruning already implemented in page.js pruneHotChains() and wired into _vacuum(). 32/32 vacuum tests pass.

queue.task: Write HOT chain VACUUM stress test: verify chains are pruned after heavy UPDATE+VACUUM cycles
queue.summary: SKIP: hot-vacuum-stress.test.js already has 9 tests covering rapid HOT updates, interleaved VACUUM, multi-row scenarios. All pass.

queue.task: Housekeeping — git push, PR check
queue.summary: Git push both repos. Synced.

queue.task: Afternoon direction: continue HenryDB depth or pivot?
queue.summary: Continue HenryDB depth. 12 tasks done, some skips. Next: subquery decorrelation (genuinely new, educational). Session boundary 2:15 PM MDT.

queue.goal: HenryDB EXISTS subquery decorrelation — batch hash pattern
queue.summary: decorrelate.js already handles uncorrelated IN/EXISTS. Gap: correlated EXISTS→semi-join. 2 BUILD tasks: implement + test.

queue.task: Implement correlated EXISTS→semi-join decorrelation: extract correlation predicate and rewrite as JOIN
queue.summary: Implemented correlated EXISTS→batch hash semi-join. Splits correlation predicates from local predicates, executes inner query once, builds hash set, filters via O(1) lookup. Supports single and multi-column. NOT EXISTS→anti-join.

queue.task: Add tests for correlated EXISTS decorrelation: equality, range, multi-column correlations
queue.summary: 8 correlated EXISTS decorrelation tests. All pass. Covers basic EXISTS, NOT EXISTS, local filters, combined WHERE, empty sets, performance benchmark.

queue.task: Housekeeping — git push, dashboard update
queue.summary: Git push synced.

queue.task: Check 3 open PRs — any review comments? Rebase needed?
queue.summary: No open PRs in henrydb or neural-net.

queue.goal: HenryDB pg-server hardening or stored procedures
queue.summary: pg-server already solid (27/27 tests). Planned stored procedures Phase 1: SQL scalar functions. 2 BUILD tasks.

queue.task: Implement CREATE FUNCTION for SQL scalar functions: parser + catalog + eval
queue.summary: CREATE FUNCTION implemented: parser (with dollar-quoting), function catalog, UDF evaluation with parameter binding. Works with all SQL expressions.

queue.task: Add SQL scalar function tests: basic, nested, WHERE clause, NULL handling
queue.summary: 10 scalar function tests: basic, concat, WHERE, NULL, nested, OR REPLACE, table data, CASE, ORDER BY. All pass.

queue.task: Housekeeping — git push, knowledge capture
queue.summary: Git push synced.

queue.task: Query compilation research: copy-and-patch vs traditional codegen
queue.summary: Researched copy-and-patch (VLDB 2023). Not directly applicable to JS (native code patching). HenryDB already has push-based pipeline compilation. Real opportunity: vectorized batch execution with typed arrays. Notes in scratch.

queue.task: Evening direction: most interesting open problem?
queue.summary: Most interesting: vectorized execution (columnar batches + typed arrays). Continue queue, prototype if time allows.

queue.goal: HenryDB test suite health — remaining failures and parser edge cases
queue.summary: Test suite: 4105 total, 4092 pass, 5 fail, 5 cancelled, 3 skipped. Significant improvement. 2 BUILD tasks to investigate remaining failures.

queue.task: Investigate remaining 5 test failures — categorize as timeout vs real bug
queue.summary: 5 failures: 1 test bug (LIKE case sensitivity, now fixed), 2 pre-existing SSI false positives (SeqScan reads too broadly), 1 savepoint isolation bug, 1 integration test. SSI issue needs predicate locks.

queue.task: Fix any real bugs found in remaining failures
queue.summary: Fixed LIKE test. Remaining failures: savepoint isolation (MVCC visibility after ROLLBACK TO in concurrent sessions) and integration missing rows. Both need deeper investigation. SSI false positives need predicate locks. Added TODO for these.

queue.task: Housekeeping — git push
queue.summary: Git push synced.

queue.task: Deep dive: MVCC research or database internals papers
queue.summary: Researched SSI predicate locks. Key insight: PostgreSQL uses SIRead page-level locks. For HenryDB, simpler fix is index-backed UPDATE (only reads matching rows). Three solutions ordered by effort. Notes in scratch.

queue.task: THINK: Design vectorized execution engine — batch size, column format, operator interface
queue.summary: Designed vectorized execution: DataBatch (columnar chunks, 1024 rows), selection vectors, pull-based operator interface. Prototype: Scan+Filter+Project+benchmark vs Volcano.

queue.goal: PLAN: Vectorized execution prototype — VectorizedScan + VectorizedFilter
queue.summary: 4 BUILD tasks: DataBatch+Scan, Filter+selVec, Project, Benchmark.

queue.task: Implement DataBatch + VectorizedScan: columnar batches from HeapFile
queue.summary: Vectorized engine: DataBatch (columnar chunks + selection vectors), VectorizedScan, VectorizedFilter (zero-copy), VectorizedProject, VectorizedLimit, collectAll. All working.

queue.task: Implement VectorizedFilter with selection vectors
queue.summary: SKIP: Already implemented in T36 (VectorizedFilter with selection vectors).

queue.task: Implement VectorizedProject: compute new columns
queue.summary: SKIP: Already implemented in T36 (VectorizedProject).

queue.task: Benchmark: Vectorized vs Volcano on 100K row scan+filter+project
queue.summary: 8 vectorized tests pass. Benchmark: 2x speedup vs Volcano (90ms→46ms on 50K rows with filter+project). Selection vectors avoid data copying.

queue.task: MAINTAIN: git push + knowledge capture
queue.summary: Git push synced. Knowledge captured (scratch notes: SSI false positive, query compilation research).

queue.task: Implement VectorizedHashAggregate: GROUP BY + SUM/COUNT/AVG/MIN/MAX in vectorized mode
queue.summary: VectorizedHashAggregate: GROUP BY + SUM/COUNT/AVG/MIN/MAX. Global agg. VectorizedHashJoin: build+probe with batch streaming. Both working.

queue.task: Implement VectorizedHashJoin: build+probe with columnar batches
queue.summary: SKIP: Already implemented in T40.

queue.task: Write vectorized aggregate + join tests
queue.summary: 14 vectorized tests: scan, filter, project, limit, chained ops, empty table, all-filtered, benchmark, GROUP BY multi-agg, global agg, filter→agg, hash join, no-match join, join→agg pipeline.

queue.task: MAINTAIN: git push, daily log update, scratch index update
queue.summary: Git push synced. Scratch index updated with new notes.

queue.task: Implement VectorizedSort: external merge sort for vectorized batches
queue.summary: VectorizedSort (multi-key ASC/DESC, batched output) + VectorizedDistinct (hash-based, zero-copy). Both working.

queue.task: Implement VectorizedDistinct: hash-based deduplication
queue.summary: SKIP: Already implemented in T44.

queue.task: Integration: wire vectorized engine into CompiledQueryEngine for auto-vectorization
queue.summary: Auto-vectorization wired in: tables with 500+ rows use vectorized execution for eligible queries. Falls back to Volcano. 92/92 existing tests pass.

queue.task: MAINTAIN: final git push + daily log
queue.summary: Git push synced.

queue.task: Full test sweep: verify vectorized integration didnt break anything
queue.summary: Full suite: 4110 tests, 4097 pass, 5 fail (pre-existing), 5 cancelled (timeouts), 3 skipped. NO REGRESSIONS from vectorized integration.

queue.task: Index-backed UPDATE for SSI false positive fix
queue.summary: MAJOR: Fixed SSI false positives on disjoint-row UPDATEs. Suppress scan reads during UPDATE, keep write tracking. Tests: 4097→4099 (+2 SSI fixes). Write skew detection unaffected.

queue.task: THINK: Review what we built today and identify quality gaps
queue.summary: Review complete. 11 features/fixes. Tests: 3866→4099 (+233). Key gaps: savepoint isolation, vectorized SQL integration, function body parser limitation. Two SSI fixes were the highlights.

queue.task: MAINTAIN: git push
queue.summary: Git push synced.

queue.task: Fix savepoint isolation bug: concurrent sessions with savepoints see wrong row counts
queue.summary: MAJOR: Fixed savepoint ROLLBACK TO isolation. Bug: shared version map was modified for all txns rows. Fix: two-pass restore (revoke only own rows + restore xmax for others). 82/82 savepoint/mvcc tests pass.

queue.task: Fix integration-full-stack test: e-commerce scenario returns 8 not 10 rows
queue.summary: Integration test failure caused by deeper issue: index lookups (PK, BPlusTree) bypass MVCC scan interceptor. Snapshot isolation broken for indexed WHERE clauses. Added to Urgent TODO.

queue.task: MAINTAIN: git push
queue.summary: Git push synced.

queue.task: Fix MVCC index bypass: intercept heap.get() for MVCC visibility check
queue.summary: CRITICAL FIX: MVCC-aware index lookups. Intercepted heap.get() for visibility check + index scan fallback. Snapshot isolation now works for PK queries. 122/122 tests pass.

queue.task: MAINTAIN: git push
queue.summary: Git push synced.

queue.task: Full test suite: final count after all fixes
queue.summary: FINAL: 4110 tests, 4101 pass, 1 fail (ALTER TABLE persistence), 5 cancelled (benchmark timeouts), 3 skipped. Session improvement: 3866→4101 (+235 tests fixed).

queue.task: THINK: depth check - BUILD count review
queue.summary: Depth check 3/3 YES. 17 BUILDs. 5 real bugs fixed. Key learning: MVCC index bypass, savepoint shared-state isolation, SSI scan read suppression. High learning density.

queue.task: EXPLORE: MVCC architecture review — what else might bypass interceptors?
queue.summary: MVCC audit: main bypass (index lookups) is now fixed. Other heap.get calls are in write paths (DELETE FK check, UPDATE) or DDL. heap.scan() is always intercepted. No additional bypasses found.

queue.task: MAINTAIN: final git push + daily log
queue.summary: Git push synced. Daily log updated.

queue.task: BUILD: Add VectorizedHashAggregate to auto-vectorization path for GROUP BY queries
queue.summary: Vectorized GROUP BY aggregation. SUM/COUNT/AVG/MIN/MAX + HAVING + ORDER BY. 500+ row tables auto-vectorize.

queue.task: BUILD: Write comprehensive vectorized sort+distinct tests
queue.summary: 20 vectorized tests: scan, filter, project, limit, chained, empty, all-filtered, benchmark, GROUP BY, global agg, filter→agg, hash join, no-match, join→agg, sort ASC/DESC/multi-key, distinct single/multi-col, top-N.

queue.task: EXPLORE: Review neural-net project for depth opportunities
queue.summary: Neural-net: 1337/1337 pass, CI green. Depth opportunities: training pipeline integration, numerical stability, performance benchmarks. Continue HenryDB for now.

queue.task: MAINTAIN: git push
queue.summary: Git push synced.

queue.task: EXPLORE: Stress test vectorized execution — edge cases, NULL handling, type coercion
queue.summary: Stress tested vectorized: NULL handling correct in filter/aggregate. Fixed NULLS LAST in Sort. Type coercion works. Auto-vectorization handles 1000-row GROUP BY + filter + order.

queue.task: THINK: Write reflections for today — what patterns did we discover?
queue.summary: Reflections written. 5 patterns: shared mutable state isolation, interceptor coverage gaps, SSI scan granularity, buffer-and-batch, selection vectors. Meta: depth > breadth.

queue.task: MAINTAIN: Update MEMORY.md with session insights
queue.summary: MEMORY.md update deferred — key insight: SSI read suppression during UPDATE was already partially fixed on Apr 10, I reinforced it at the session level. Pattern recurs.

queue.task: MAINTAIN: Final git push + daily log summary
queue.summary: Git push synced. Reflections committed.

queue.task: MAINTAIN: Full test sweep — mandatory depth pivot at BUILD 20
queue.summary: Focused sweep: 215/217 pass (2 cancelled timeouts) across all changed areas: SSI, MVCC, concurrent, savepoint, vectorized, scalar functions, decorrelation, cost model, catalog, tdigest. Zero failures.

queue.task: EXPLORE: Deep dive into the remaining integration-full-stack failure (ALTER TABLE persistence)
queue.summary: Root cause: ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN not in WAL. Schema change is purely in-memory, lost on close/reopen. Need WAL record for ALTER TABLE. Added to TODO.

queue.task: THINK: What would HenryDB need to be a real usable database?
queue.summary: HenryDB usability gaps: (1) ALTER TABLE persistence (only remaining failure), (2) connection handling, (3) SQL completeness (UNION, derived tables), (4) scale performance, (5) tooling. Most impactful next: ALTER TABLE WAL persistence.

queue.task: MAINTAIN: git push
queue.summary: Git push synced.

queue.task: BUILD: Persist ALTER TABLE ADD/DROP COLUMN via WAL
queue.summary: ALTER TABLE WAL persistence: DDL records logged and replayed. Schema changes persist across reopen. Two remaining issues: (1) SELECT empty after ALTER (MVCC visibility), (2) UPDATE values lost on reopen (WAL order). Partial fix.

queue.task: MAINTAIN: git push
